title: Senior Financial Analyst - Federal Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Federal Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Federal Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Federal Bank:
Federal Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
